channel.title: azure on Jack Collins
channel.description: Recent content in azure on Jack Collins

item.title: Setting up Azure Sentinel on AWS EC2 Linux servers
item.description: Scenario Azure offer a solution for installing Sentinel on AWS EC2 Linux instances, however their script required amendment for me to get it to work and I had to make a Pull Request to resolve, as well as some additional notes and IAM rules above what Azure instructed. Below are the notes I used, hopefully they can help you too. Contents Microsoft’s Azure Sentinel repoistory is located here. Create an IAM User Set Up Permissions
